creator: dean@odyssey.apana.org.au
text:
Upgraded Port: mail/dcc-dccd to 1.3.42

Changes in this release:

	o	Correct wrong count of `cdcc "clients -i 10.11.12.13"`.

	o	Change rcDCC.in back to allow the use of /var/run for 
		PID files.

	o	Fixed rcDCC*.* so that it does not nuke all running 
		processes found in /var/run etc.
